description: Chat page — a conversational AI interface where users plan features with Claude and generate executable workflows from natural-language discussions. Covers both the /chat landing page and /chat/[id] active session page.

groups.name: Page Purpose
groups.description: The Chat page is a conversational AI interface for planning and prototyping automation workflows. Users start a new chat session with Claude, have a free-form conversation to plan features, discuss architecture, brainstorm ideas, or ask questions, and then generate an executable multi-phase workflow directly from the conversation. The page has two views: a landing page (/chat) for starting new sessions, and an active session view (/chat/[id]) with a split-panel layout for chatting and previewing generated workflows side-by-side.

assertions.description: Users can create a new chat session to start a conversation with Claude. The 'New Chat' button on the landing page initiates a WebSocket session with the connected runner and navigates to the active session view.

Users can type and send messages to Claude in a real-time conversation. Messages are sent by pressing Enter (Shift+Enter for newlines) or clicking the send button. The AI responds with markdown-formatted messages that stream in real-time.
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page (/chat/[id])

assertions.description: Users can view the full conversation history in a scrollable message area. User messages appear right-aligned with brand-colored backgrounds; AI messages appear left-aligned with markdown rendering (code blocks, lists, links, etc.).
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Users can interrupt the AI while it is processing/responding. When the session is in 'processing' state, the send button is replaced by an interrupt (stop) button that cancels the current AI response.
assertions.precondition: AI is currently processing a response (session state is 'processing')

assertions.description: Users can generate an executable multi-phase workflow from the conversation. After at least 2 messages have been exchanged, a 'Generate Workflow' button appears. Clicking it sends the conversation context to the AI, which produces a structured workflow with setup, verification, agentic, and completion phases.
assertions.precondition: At least 2 messages have been exchanged in the conversation

assertions.description: Users can preview the generated workflow in a side panel that shows the workflow name, description, tags, and all steps organized by execution phase (setup, verification, agentic, completion). The layout splits into a 50/50 chat-on-left, workflow-on-right view.
assertions.precondition: A workflow has been generated from the conversation

assertions.description: Users can execute the generated workflow directly from the preview panel without leaving the chat page
assertions.precondition: Workflow preview panel is visible with a successfully generated workflow

assertions.description: Users can open the generated workflow in the Workflow Builder (/build/workflows) for detailed editing of individual steps, phases, and configuration
assertions.precondition: Workflow preview panel is visible with a successfully generated workflow

assertions.description: Users can save the generated workflow to the workflow library for later use, making it available from the Workflow Builder sidebar
assertions.precondition: Workflow preview panel is visible with a successfully generated workflow

assertions.description: Users can regenerate the workflow if the initial result is unsatisfactory. This clears the current workflow and re-runs generation with the same conversation context.
assertions.precondition: Workflow preview panel is visible with a successfully generated workflow

assertions.description: Users can rename a chat session by clicking the session name in the header, which switches to an inline text input. The name auto-generates from the first message but can be customized at any time.
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Users can close the current chat session and return to the landing page. The close button is in the session header.
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Users can see the current session state (Ready, Processing, Disconnected, Closed) via a color-coded badge in the header and a label above the input area, so they know when the AI is available or busy
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Users can see whether the runner is connected or offline. A runner connection is required to create sessions and send messages. The status appears on both the landing page header and the session header.
Users can toggle whether the generated workflow should include UI Bridge SDK integration instructions. This checkbox is persisted to localStorage and appears alongside the Generate Workflow button.
assertions.precondition: At least 2 messages have been exchanged (Generate Workflow button visible)

groups.name: Landing Page Structure
groups.description: Core layout elements of the Chat landing page (/chat): page header with title, runner status, and new chat button; main content area with session list or empty state

assertions.description: Chat landing page root container is present
Page heading 'Chat' is present
assertions.precondition: User is on the /chat landing page

assertions.description: New Chat button is present in the landing page header
assertions.precondition: User is on the /chat landing page

assertions.description: Runner connection status indicator is present in the landing page header
assertions.precondition: User is on the /chat landing page

assertions.description: Session list area is present (shows previous sessions or empty state)
assertions.precondition: Runner is connected (session list only renders when runner is online)

groups.name: Session Page Structure
groups.description: Core layout elements of the active chat session page (/chat/[id]): header bar, chat panel (messages + input), and optional workflow preview panel

assertions.description: Chat session page root container is present
assertions.precondition: User has navigated to an active chat session (/chat/[id])

assertions.description: Chat panel containing messages and input is present
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Workflow preview panel container appears when a workflow is generated (right half of split layout)
assertions.precondition: A workflow has been generated and the preview panel is open

groups.name: Chat Header Elements
groups.description: Elements in the session header bar: session name (editable), session state badge, runner status, and close button

assertions.description: Chat header bar is present
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Clickable session name for inline editing is present
assertions.precondition: User is on an active session page and not currently editing the name

assertions.description: Session state badge (Ready/Processing/Disconnected/Closed) is present
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Runner connection status indicator in session header is present
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Close session button (X) is present in the header
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

groups.name: Chat Input Elements
groups.description: Elements in the chat input area: message textarea, send/interrupt button, session state label, generate workflow button, and UI Bridge toggle

assertions.description: Chat input container is present
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Message textarea with auto-resize (min 42px, max 120px) is present
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Send button is present when session is not processing
assertions.precondition: User is on an active session page and session is in 'ready' state

assertions.description: Interrupt (stop) button replaces the send button while AI is processing
assertions.precondition: AI is currently processing a response (session state is 'processing')

assertions.description: Session state label (Ready/Processing/Connecting/Disconnected/Session Closed) is displayed above the input
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Generate Workflow button appears after 2+ messages have been exchanged
assertions.precondition: At least 2 messages in the conversation (user + AI)

assertions.description: UI Bridge toggle checkbox appears alongside the Generate Workflow button
assertions.precondition: Generate Workflow button is visible (2+ messages exchanged)

groups.name: Message Area Elements
groups.description: Elements in the chat message display area: scrollable message container, user and AI message bubbles, streaming indicator, and scroll-to-bottom button

assertions.description: Scrollable messages container is present
assertions.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

assertions.description: Streaming indicator (animated dots or partial markdown) appears while AI is generating a response
assertions.precondition: AI is currently streaming a response

assertions.description: Scroll-to-bottom button appears when user has scrolled up from the latest messages
assertions.precondition: User has scrolled up in the message area (not at bottom)

groups.name: Workflow Preview Panel Elements
groups.description: Elements in the workflow preview panel: panel header with close button, workflow name/description/tags, collapsible phase sections, and action buttons (Execute, Edit, Regenerate, Save)

assertions.description: Workflow preview panel root is present
assertions.precondition: Workflow generation has been triggered (panel is open)

assertions.description: Close button to dismiss the workflow preview panel
assertions.precondition: Workflow preview panel is visible

assertions.description: Collapsible phase sections container showing workflow steps grouped by phase
assertions.precondition: Workflow has been successfully generated (not loading, no error)

assertions.description: Execute button to run the workflow directly
assertions.precondition: Workflow has been successfully generated

assertions.description: Edit in Builder button to open workflow in the full editor
assertions.precondition: Workflow has been successfully generated

assertions.description: Regenerate button to re-generate the workflow from conversation
assertions.precondition: Workflow has been successfully generated

assertions.description: Save to Library button to persist the workflow for later use
assertions.precondition: Workflow has been successfully generated

assertions.description: Loading spinner appears while workflow is being generated
assertions.precondition: Workflow generation is in progress

groups.name: Landing Page State
groups.description: Interactive state of landing page controls: New Chat button disabled when runner is offline, enabled when runner is connected

assertions.description: New Chat button is disabled when the runner is not connected
assertions.precondition: Runner is offline (not connected)

assertions.description: New Chat button is enabled when the runner is connected and WebSocket is ready
assertions.precondition: Runner is connected and chat WebSocket is established

groups.name: Chat Input State
groups.description: Interactive state of chat input controls: send button enabled/disabled based on message content and session state, textarea disabled when session is closed or disconnected

assertions.description: Send button is disabled when the message textarea is empty
assertions.precondition: Session is in 'ready' state and textarea is empty

assertions.description: Message textarea is disabled when the session is closed or disconnected
assertions.precondition: Session state is 'closed' or 'disconnected'

assertions.description: Message textarea is enabled and accepts input when session is ready
assertions.precondition: Session state is 'ready' and runner is connected

assertions.description: Generate Workflow button is disabled while a workflow is being generated
assertions.precondition: Workflow generation is in progress

groups.name: Workflow Panel State
groups.description: State consistency for the workflow preview panel: loading state shows spinner, error state shows alert, success state shows phases and action buttons

assertions.description: Workflow loading state displays a spinner with 'Generating workflow...' text
assertions.precondition: Workflow generation was triggered and is still in progress

assertions.description: Successful generation displays the phases container with collapsible step sections
assertions.precondition: Workflow generation completed successfully

assertions.description: Execute button is visible when workflow generation succeeds
assertions.precondition: Workflow generation completed successfully

assertions.description: Execute button is enabled and clickable when a workflow is generated
assertions.precondition: Workflow preview panel shows a successfully generated workflow

groups.name: Message Display State
groups.description: State consistency for the message display area: empty state when no messages, auto-scroll behavior, streaming content display

assertions.description: Empty state with prompt text is shown when no messages have been sent yet
assertions.precondition: Chat session is open with no messages

assertions.description: Streaming indicator is visible while AI is generating a response
assertions.precondition: AI is processing/streaming a response
